templates.title: Thread Pool Executor — parallel map dengan results
templates.description: Map function ke list items secara parallel menggunakan ThreadPoolExecutor. Collect semua results.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(func, items, max_workers={{max_workers}}, timeout=None):
    """Map function to items in parallel using threads.
    Returns list of results in same order as items.
    Raises on first exception encountered.
    """
    results = [None] * len(items)
    with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=max_workers) as executor:
        future_to_idx = {executor.submit(func, item): i for i, item in enumerate(items)}
        for future in concurrent.futures.as_completed(future_to_idx, timeout=timeout):
            idx = future_to_idx[future]
            results[idx] = future.result()
    return results

templates.title: Process Pool — CPU-bound parallel map
templates.description: Parallel map menggunakan multiprocessing. Cocok untuk CPU-heavy tasks.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(func, items, max_workers={{max_workers}}, chunksize=1):
    """Map function to items in parallel using processes.
    Best for CPU-bound tasks. Func must be picklable (top-level defined).
    Returns list of results in same order as items.
    """
    with concurrent.futures.ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=max_workers) as executor:
        results = list(executor.map(func, items, chunksize=chunksize))
    return results

templates.title: Async Gather — jalankan N coroutine parallel
templates.description: Wrapper asyncio.gather yang return list results + handle exception per-task.

templates.title: Producer-Consumer Queue
templates.description: Thread-safe producer-consumer pattern dengan queue. Multi-producer, multi-consumer.

templates.title: Rate-Limited Executor
templates.description: Execute tasks dari queue dengan rate limit (N task per detik). Thread-safe.

templates.title: Timeout Context Manager
templates.description: Context manager untuk timeout eksekusi blok kode. Pakai signal (Unix) atau threading.

templates.title: Semaphore Concurrency Limiter
templates.description: Batasi jumlah concurrent operations menggunakan semaphore. Bisa sebagai decorator.

templates.title: Bounded Thread Pool Executor
templates.description: Thread pool dengan bounded queue. Reject task saat penuh, bukan block forever.

templates.title: Debounce Decorator
templates.description: Decorator debounce: hanya panggil fungsi setelah idle selama X detik. Thread-safe.
templates.code:
def {{nama_decorator}}(wait_seconds={{default_wait}}):
    """Debounce decorator: delay function call until wait_seconds have elapsed
    since last invocation. Previous pending call is cancelled.
    """
    def decorator(func):
        timer = [None]
        lock = threading.Lock()
        last_args = [None]
        last_kwargs = [None]

        def _execute():
            with lock:
                args = last_args[0]
                kwargs = last_kwargs[0]
                timer[0] = None
            func(*args, **kwargs)

        @functools.wraps(func)
        def wrapper(*args, **kwargs):
            with lock:
                last_args[0] = args
                last_kwargs[0] = kwargs
                if timer[0] is not None:
                    timer[0].cancel()
                timer[0] = threading.Timer(wait_seconds, _execute)
                timer[0].daemon = True
                timer[0].start()

        wrapper.cancel = lambda: (timer[0].cancel() if timer[0] else None)
        return wrapper
    return decorator

templates.title: Throttle Decorator
templates.description: Decorator throttle: batasi fungsi dipanggil maksimal 1x per interval. Thread-safe.
